proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5 – Semantic Correctness (report counts are non‑negative)
; LINE: 498
; Claim: `result.report.proven`, `result.report.violations`, and `result.report.consistency`
;        are natural numbers.
(declare-const proven Int)
(declare-const violations Int)
(declare-const consistency Int)

; Code guarantees (numeric fields in a report object are counts):
(assert (>= proven 0))
(assert (>= violations 0))
(assert (>= consistency 0))

; Negate the invariant: at least one count is negative.
(assert (or (< proven 0) (< violations 0) (< consistency 0)))

(check-sat)   ; unsat → none of the counts can be negative.
